name: Rava Laddu
steps: Roast the rava in two spoons of ghee on low heat until aromatic, never browning it.
Fry cashews and raisins in ghee until golden.
Mix rava, powdered sugar, coconut, cardamom and the fried nuts.
Add the remaining warm ghee and sprinkle warm milk little by little.
Press and roll into tight laddus while the mixture is still warm.
